name: vibecommit-capture
description: VibeCommit session-capture plugin for Claude Code. Installs the cooperation-rate rules files (AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md) so Claude calls commit_transcript after every commit.

plugins.name: vibecommit-capture
plugins.description: Install the VibeCommit MCP rules files (AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md + SKILL.md) and MCP server config for one-command session capture.
